## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (server)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (server)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes (mobile, if mobile changed)
- [ ] `flutter test` passes (mobile, if mobile changed)
- [ ] Touched the crypto layer? Tagged a maintainer for review.
